description: Connect to Help Scout to sync conversations, customers, mailboxes, users, and tags.

install_fields.label: App ID
install_fields.description: Your Help Scout OAuth app's App ID (client_id). Found under Your Profile → My Apps.

install_fields.label: App Secret
install_fields.description: Your Help Scout OAuth app's App Secret (client_secret). Found under Your Profile → My Apps.

apis.name: Sync
apis.description: Sync conversations, customers, mailboxes, and users from Help Scout.

apis.name: List Conversations
apis.description: Return all conversations across pages (HAL pagination).

apis.name: Get Conversation
apis.description: Return a single conversation by ID.

apis.name: List Customers
apis.description: Return all customers across pages (HAL pagination).

apis.name: List Users
apis.description: Return all users across pages (HAL pagination).

name: HelpScoutConnector
